title: Storybook 10.3 Release
citation: Storybook. Storybook 10.3 release notes. Mar 2026. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Frontend component testing and documentation workflow planning.
claims_supported: Storybook 10.3 includes Vite 8 support, Next.js 16.2 support, accessibility improvements, and Storybook MCP preview for React.
claims_not_supported: That Storybook can validate WebXR headset performance.
That Storybook MCP should be used without security review.
